author: mark
text:
Clippy pedantic cleanup

Enable clippy::pedantic in Cargo.toml and clear the resulting
warnings. The bulk of the diff is mechanical format-arg inlining.
Real fixes: is_some_and / is_none_or / map_or, redundant closures,
match-same-arms, items-after-statements, single-char pattern,
panic-in-if, assigning-clones, u64-to-u8 via try_from, and stripping
an unnecessary Result wrap from plugin::runner::parse_outcome.
Allow missing_errors_doc, doc_markdown, must_use_candidate,
needless_pass_by_value, and cast_precision_loss — these categories
are noise for this crate (errors are obvious from signatures; CLI
handlers own their clap args; ratio math doesn't need try_from).
